headline: Boston Scientific Unveils “Practice-Transforming” Trial Data for PE and AF at ACC Conference Call
summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) executives highlighted new data from two randomized clinical trials during an American College of Cardiology conference call, describing the results as potentially “practice transforming” for pulmonary embolism (PE) and stroke prevention in atrial fibrillation (AF).
